blocks.text: Double comeback night: Liverpool and Barcelona face the impossible

Two 2-0 deficits, one night. Liverpool call on Anfield's spirit against PSG; Barcelona face the same impossible odds on enemy turf at the Metropolitano — and UEFA already rejected their first-leg complaint.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 Major underway — rain (Håvard Nygaard) in the hunt for CS2 glory

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday CL — the drama continues
items: Arsenal vs Sporting CP 21:00 — Ødegaard fitness doubt, Arsenal defend slim 1-0 aggregate lead
Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid 21:00 — Bayern protect 2-1 lead at home against a wounded giant
